candidate_definition_hints.text: The core library of the HaxeUI framework

`haxeui-core` is a users universal entry point into the HaxeUI framework and allows for the same user interface code (either with markup or via `haxe` source code) to be used to build a user interface on various platforms using various HaxeUI `backends`. Below is a general overv…
